final:
module RefModule (
    input wire D,
    input wire CLK,
    output reg Q,
    output reg Qn
);
    reg unused_master_Q;

    always @(posedge CLK) begin
        unused_master_Q <= D; // Capture D on rising edge
    end

    always @(negedge CLK) begin
        Q <= unused_master_Q; // Output Q on falling edge
        Qn <= ~unused_master_Q; // Inverted output
    end
endmodule
